header.title: Intermittent Fasting Guide
header.subtitle: Master the science of time-restricted eating

stages.title: Digestion Phase (Anabolic State)
stages.description: Your body is digesting food and storing energy. Blood sugar rises as nutrients are absorbed.

stages.title: Fat Burning Begins (Catabolic State)
stages.description: Insulin levels drop and your body starts breaking down stored fat for energy.

stages.title: Cellular Cleanup (Autophagy)
stages.description: Your body begins removing damaged cells and recycling old proteins - like internal spring cleaning.

stages.title: Peak Fat Burning (Deep Ketosis)
stages.description: Your body is fully running on fat. Growth hormone increases and fat burning reaches its peak.

breaksFast.title: What Breaks a Fast?
breaksFast.safeList: Water, Black Coffee, Plain Tea, Sparkling Water, Salt/Electrolytes
breaksFast.breaksList: Anything with calories - milk, sugar, cream, protein shakes, BCAAs, diet soda with artificial sweeteners

tip1.title: Start Gradually
tip1.desc: Begin with 12:12 and work up to longer fasts

tip2.title: Stay Hydrated
tip2.desc: Drink plenty of water throughout your fast

tip3.title: Listen to Your Body
tip3.desc: Feeling unwell? It's okay to break your fast

tip4.title: Quality Matters
tip4.desc: Focus on nutrient-dense foods during eating window

form.title: Log Today's Fast
form.goalAchieved: Goal Achieved! You completed a 16+ hour fast!
